ALIST OF ACET MEMBER FIRMS - GOOD STANDING
ACET Future Leaders
Eng. Farida   Mawenya
WELCOME TO ACET
Dear Esteemed Visitors,
It is with great pleasure and pride that I welcome you to the official website of the Association of Consulting Engineers Tanzania (ACET). As the President of ACET, I am honored to extend a warm greeting to all engineers, professionals, stakeholders, and everyone who have chosen to explore our online platform. Here, you will discover a wealth of information about our organization, its mission, values, and the opportunities we offer to both experienced experts and emerging talents in the field of consulting engineering. At ACET, we are committed to promoting excellence, professionalism, and ethical conduct in the practice of consulting engineering across Tanzania and beyond. Through this website, we aim to foster a vibrant community of engineers, facilitate knowledge-sharing, and provide valuable resources to support your professional growth and development. Whether you are seeking networking opportunities, access to industry insights, or looking to engage with like-minded individuals, ACET is your trusted partner on this journey. Join us, and let’s embark on a collaborative venture towards shaping the future of consulting engineering together.
Join now! Click here, and we'll contact you shortly
BECAME A MEMBER

A BIT ABOUT ACET
﻿
The Association of Consulting Engineers Tanzania (ACET) is a non-profit organization established in 1985 to promote the practice of consulting engineering in Tanzania with a focus on professional ethics and business integrity. With a membership comprising over 180 local professionals and firms, ACET represents a diverse range of engineering
leovegas casino
leovegas casino online
 disciplines, including civil, structural, electrical, mechanical, and environmental engineering. As a member of the International Federation of Consulting Engineers (FIDIC) since 1986, ACET aligns itself with global standards and best practices in the consulting engineering industry.

extracted_texts.aab6d98a89a1.pdf:
NOTICE OF THE 39TH ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING
Notice is hereby given that the 39th Annual General Meeting (AGM) of the
Association of Consulting Engineers Tanzania (ACET) will be held as per the
details below:



Date         : Friday 25Th July 2025
Time         : 2.00 PM - 6.00PM
Venue        : Serena Hotel, Dar es Salaam


AGENDA

AGM 39.1     OPENING
AGM 39.2     NOTICE, QUORUM, AND ADOPTION OF AGENDA
AGM 39.3     CONFIRMATION OF MINUTES OF THE 38TH AGM
AGM 39.4     DISCUSS MATTERS ARISING FROM MINUTES OF THE 38TH AGM
AGM 39.5     TO RECEIVE AND CONSIDER ANNUAL REPORTS 2024/2025
AGM 39.6     TO RECEIVE AND APPROVE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS FOR FY 2024
AGM 39.7     TO RECEIVE AND APPROVE BUDGET FOR THE YEAR 2026
AGM 39.8      TO APPOINT EXTERNAL AUDITORS FOR THE YEAR ENDING 31
              DECEMBER 2025 AND APPROVE REMUNERATION
AGM 39.9     CLOSING THE MEETING




Dated at Dar es Salaam this 20th day of June, 2025
By Order of the Council
Association of Consulting Engineers Tanzania (ACET)




Executive Director
Plot No. 125/50, Mansfield Street
Office No. 1105, 11th Floor, Samora Tower
P.O. Box 63, Dar es Salaam


                                                                  1|Page
